title: Perfectly Optimized
description: A client-side modpack focused solely on optimizing every aspect of Minecraft to ensure best performance.
body:
![Banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86273d496709a324eddd9c71f7f6768e94f1729c.png)
# **About Perfectly Optimized**
**Perfectly Optimized** aims to optimize every aspect of Minecraft to ensure the **best possible performance** — nothing more, nothing less.
This modpack not only enhances performance, but also includes a few essential client-side features like **shader support, zoom, and fullbright** to make your gameplay better and more enjoyable.
## **Why Perfectly Optimized?**
It combines the most powerful modern optimization mods, carefully tweaked and configured to deliver **higher FPS, faster world loading, quicker world generation, and smooth, lag-free gameplay** — all without altering the vanilla Minecraft experience.
## **What Makes It Different?**
While many _other optimization modpacks_ focus only on boosting FPS, **Perfectly Optimized** goes further.
It not only delivers **maximum FPS**, but also improves **server performance**, **enables faster chunk generation at high render distances**, and **reduces loading times** and **lag spikes**.
## **Works Anywhere**
**Perfectly Optimized** is a **lightweight, client-side** modpack that doesn’t add any additional content to the game, making it compatible with **almost any server or world**.
## **Other Notes**
You’re free to add your own QoL, shader, or content mods to the pack — just be sure to include credit (a link back to this page works great).

> Also check out **Brilliantly Optimized (Coming Soon)** — it includes all the performance of Perfectly Optimized, plus quality-of-life features, graphics enhancements, and small improvements — all without sacrificing performance.
